summary: Strip a stray backtick the generator appends after the base URL in auth/doctor/helpers/MCP key-hint strings, and rank churn's no-check-in-on-record clients first.
reason: The generator templates the 'Get a key at: <base_url>' hints with a trailing backtick, producing a malformed URL that auth setup prints and browser-opens. churn used a -1 sentinel for never-attended clients that sorted them last under descending order, hiding the most at-risk clients.
validated_outcome: Greptile P1 (malformed auth URL) and P2 (churn sort) resolved; build + shipcheck green.
